ddls:
CREATE TABLE "noodle_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the noodle */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variety of the noodle */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style of the noodle */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of origin of the noodle */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "stars" REAL /* Star rating given to the noodle (out of 5) */,
  "top_ten" TEXT /* Indicates if the noodle is in the top ten list (Yes/No) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "flavor_profile" TEXT /* Description of the flavor profile */,
  "texture" TEXT /* Description of the texture */,
  "cooking_time" TEXT /* Cooking time of the noodles */,
  "serving_size" TEXT /* Serving size of the noodles */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the noodle product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for an image of the noodle product */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL for a video review */,
  "verified_purchase" TEXT /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase (Yes/No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_noodle_reviews_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_noodle_reviews_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_noodle_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_noodle_reviews_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_noodle_reviews_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's official website */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL for the brand's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variety */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the variety */,
  "variety_description" TEXT /* Description of the variety */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* Main ingredients of the variety */,
  "allergens" TEXT /* Allergens present in the variety */,
  "nutritional_info" TEXT /* Nutritional information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style (e.g., Cup, Pack) */,
  "style_description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "recommended_cooking_method" TEXT /* Recommended cooking methods */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL for the country's flag */,
  "cuisine_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the country's cuisine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL for the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the user review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the user review was submitted */,
  "pros" TEXT /* Pros of the noodle */,
  "cons" TEXT /* Cons of the noodle */,
  "verified_purchase" TEXT /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase (Yes/No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "top_ten_list" (
  "list_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry in the top ten list */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the noodle variety */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the noodle variety in the top ten list */,
  "list_date" TEXT /* Date when the variety was added to the top ten list */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the variety */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the variety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("list_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_top_ten_list_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id")
)
